Petition To Establish Minor'S Settlement Trust; Bring Trust Under Continuing Jurisdiction Of Alameda
Off Calendar Oct-16-2017 Granted Per Written Order

Petition To Establish Minor'S Settlement Trust; Bring Trust Under Continuing Jurisdiction Of Alameda
Off Calendar Oct-02-2017 Continued To Oct-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Trisha Friedeberg specially appearing for Kevin Urbatsch on behalf of Petitioner.

The Court informed Counsel that it will not permit section 6.06 (amendment by Trust Protector) and that it needs a revised order deleting that section from the Trust. With respect to the request for interim fees, Ms. Friedeberg stated that perhaps the Court could permit up to ten hours per month at Mr. Thomas' hourly rate of $125.00. The Court stated that they need to file a declaration regarding estimates of services Mr. Thomas will be providing. The Petition to Establish Minor's Settlement Trust, etc. is continued to October 16, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Status on filing of a petition for change of venue is also set for October 16, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Paul H. Alvarado. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.
